# Ham Documentation

> Ham is a campus life assistant app for Wuhan University (WHU), providing course schedules, GPA calculation, library reservations, sports venue booking, campus bus tracking, and more.

## Documentation Site

- URL: https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn
- Languages: Chinese (default), English, Japanese
- Framework: VitePress

## Sections

- [User Handbook](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/handbook/): Usage guides for all features
- [Download](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/download/): App download links
- [Developers](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/): Developer documentation
- [Ham Connect (Open Platform)](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/open-platform/): OAuth2 SSO integration for third-party apps
- [Ham Web](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/ham-web/): Web frontend and SSO authorization
- [Ham React Native Components](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/developers/ham-rn/): React Native component library
- [Privacy Policy](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/privacy/): Privacy and user agreements
- [About](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/about/): About Ham

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://docs.ham.nowcent.cn/llms-full.txt): Full page listing with descriptions
